items.title: Salesforce’s (CRM) Agentforce Gets Real-World Testimony in Analyst-Led Call
items.description: Salesforce, Inc. (NYSE:CRM) is one of the 10 AI Stocks Investors Are Watching This Week. On July 7, Cantor Fitzgerald analyst Matthew VanVliet reiterated an “Overweight” rating on the stock with a $325.00 price target. The rating affirmation was made ahead of an upcoming client call featuring a customer of the company’s Agentforce product. Cantor hosted the […]

items.title: Salesforce's Head of AI Sees Digital Labor Revolution
items.description: "The moment of the digital labor revolution is upon us," Adam Evans, Salesforce's head of AI, says. Speaking on "Bloomberg The Close," Evans discusses scaling the technology and driving productivity.

items.title: Microsoft Touts $500 Million AI Savings While Slashing Jobs
items.description: (Bloomberg) -- Microsoft Corp. is keen to show employees how much AI is transforming its own workplace, even as the company terminates thousands of personnel. items.title: SoundHound AI (SOUN) Jumps 11.7% on Agentic AI Boom
items.description: SoundHound AI, Inc. (NASDAQ:SOUN) is one of These 10 Stocks Are Making Big Moves. SoundHound AI rallied for a second day on Tuesday, jumping 11.69 percent to finish at $12.71 apiece as investors took path from the booming capabilities of Agentic AI. Agentic AI refers to artificial intelligence systems designed to act autonomously, make decisions, and […]

items.title: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) Expands Board with Tech Innovators and Integrates Datassential Plugin
items.description: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) recently appointed Amy Chang and David Kirk to its Board of Directors and launched the Datassential Salesforce Plugin, enhancing its CRM capabilities. Over the last quarter, the company's stock price increased by 3%, aligning with a generally positive market trend driven by high-performing technology stocks. Despite global market fluctuations and tariff uncertainties, Salesforce's expansion efforts and new partnerships, including with PepsiCo and ACI Infotech,...
